summary: Tested code quality fixes for Printsout e-commerce app. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend loads correctly at / and /produkter. Admin login page works at /admin. Fixed missing toast imports in Home.js and AdminDashboard.js. Verified sessionStorage usage in AuthContext and AdminContext. All sub-components (ShippingTaxSection, DiscountCodesSection, TwoFASection, OrderDetailPanel) load correctly. Backend starts without errors after email_service.py refactoring.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.js (added missing toast import, removed unused useCallback import)

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA with TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator

context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality fixes verified: (1) Empty catch blocks now have proper error handling with toast messages, (2) React hook dependencies fixed with useCallback in AuthContext, AdminContext, AdminReviews, AdminPayments, AdminDashboard, AdminSettings, Account, (3) localStorage changed to sessionStorage for auth tokens in AuthContext (line 16, 31, 73) and AdminContext (line 15, 36, 39), (4) AdminSettings.js split into AdminSettings + ShippingTaxSection + DiscountCodesSection + TwoFASection, (5) AdminOrders.js split into AdminOrders + OrderDetailPanel, (6) server.py refactored to import email functions from email_service.py module.

verified_features.homepage_loads: ✓ Homepage loads at / with hero, categories, reviews sections
verified_features.products_page_loads: ✓ Products page loads at /produkter with 14 products
verified_features.admin_login_page: ✓ Admin login page loads at /admin with email/password inputs and 2FA requirement
verified_features.customer_login_page: ✓ Customer login page loads at /logga-in with forgot password link
verified_features.sub_components_exist: ✓ ShippingTaxSection, DiscountCodesSection, TwoFASection, OrderDetailPanel all exist and lint clean
verified_features.email_service_module: ✓ email_service.py properly imported in server.py, backend starts without errors
verified_features.error_handling_toast: ✓ Home.js and AdminDashboard.js now have toast import for error handling

code_quality_verification.useCallback_dependencies: Verified in AuthContext.js, AdminContext.js, AdminReviews.js, AdminPayments.js, AdminDashboard.js, AdminSettings.js, Account.js
code_quality_verification.component_splitting: AdminSettings.js uses ShippingTaxSection, DiscountCodesSection, TwoFASection; AdminOrders.js uses OrderDetailPanel
code_quality_verification.backend_refactoring: server.py imports send_order_confirmation, send_discount_emails, build_password_reset_html from email_service

backend_api_tests.email_service import check: ✓ Checkout endpoint exists, email_service properly imported

frontend_ui_tests.Homepage /: ✓ Loads with hero, categories, reviews, CTA buttons
frontend_ui_tests.Admin /admin: ✓ Login form with email, password, 2FA requirement
frontend_ui_tests.Customer /logga-in: ✓ Login form with forgot password link
